items.line_en: So today is your first day as a mechanic. Are you ready to be trained?

coach.say: So today is your first day as a mechanic. Are you ready to be trained?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So today is your first day as a mechanic. / Are you ready to be trained?

items.line_en: But sir, I'm here to learn about cars, not trains.

coach.say: But sir, I'm here to learn about cars, not trains.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But sir, / I'm here to learn about cars, / not trains.

items.line_en: Good one, Subandee. Let's begin.

coach.say: Good one, Subandee. Let's begin.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good one, / Subandee. / Let's begin.

items.line_en: This car has old whiteboards. We need to replace them with new ones.

coach.say: This car has old whiteboards. We need to replace them with new ones.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This car has old whiteboards. / We need to replace them with new ones.

items.line_en: Go fetch me a wiper from the cupboard.

coach.say: Go fetch me a wiper from the cupboard.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Go fetch me a wiper from the cupboard.

items.line_en: But sir, I'm not a sneak timer.

coach.say: But sir, I'm not a sneak timer.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But sir, / I'm not a sneak timer.

items.line_en: What if the one provides me?

coach.say: What if the one provides me?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What if / the one provides me?

items.line_en: Never mind. Let's move on to the next car.

coach.say: Never mind. Let's move on to the next car.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Never mind. / Let's move on to the next car.

items.line_en: First, first I'm here in the other tyres.

coach.say: First, first I'm here in the other tyres.
coach.hint: Chunk it: First, / first I'm here in the other tyres.

items.line_en: Why do we need to film air, sir?

coach.say: Why do we need to film air, sir?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Why do we need to film air, / sir?

items.line_en: Are the tyres too?

coach.say: Are the tyres too?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Are the tyres too?

items.line_en: No, Subandee.

coach.say: No, Subandee.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / Subandee.

items.line_en: A mechanic has to make sure that the air pressure is equal in all four tyres of a car.

coach.say: A mechanic has to make sure that the air pressure is equal in all four tyres of a car.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A mechanic has to make sure that the air pressure is equal in all four tyres of a car.

items.line_en: Remember that.

coach.say: Remember that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Remember that.

items.line_en: Now, get me a spare tyre from the boot.

coach.say: Now, get me a spare tyre from the boot.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now, / get me a spare tyre from the boot.

items.line_en: Subandee, what are you doing?

coach.say: Subandee, what are you doing?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subandee, / what are you doing?

items.line_en: I'm trying to look for the spare tyre in your boot.

coach.say: I'm trying to look for the spare tyre in your boot.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm trying to look for the spare tyre in your boot.

items.line_en: But you aren't letting me.

coach.say: But you aren't letting me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But you aren't letting me.

items.line_en: Subandee, I'm in the boot of the car. Forget it.

coach.say: Subandee, I'm in the boot of the car. Forget it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subandee, / I'm in the boot of the car. / Forget it.

items.line_en: I'll get the tyre. You go and fetch me a jack.

coach.say: I'll get the tyre. You go and fetch me a jack.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'll get the tyre. / You go and fetch me a jack.

items.line_en: Who's this, Subandee?

coach.say: Who's this, Subandee?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Who's this, / Subandee?

items.line_en: Didn't you need a jack, sir?

coach.say: Didn't you need a jack, sir?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Didn't you need a jack, / sir?

items.line_en: And this is the jack.

coach.say: And this is the jack.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And this is the jack.

items.line_en: I do not probably get in here, though.

coach.say: I do not probably get in here, though.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I do not probably get in here, / though.

items.line_en: Subandee, let him go.

coach.say: Subandee, let him go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subandee, / let him go.

items.line_en: Ah, Subandee, you have wasted so much time.

coach.say: Ah, Subandee, you have wasted so much time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ah, / Subandee, / you have wasted so much time.

items.line_en: Okay, I need to rush one an urgent meeting.

coach.say: Okay, I need to rush one an urgent meeting.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / I need to rush one an urgent meeting.

items.line_en: The owner is coming in an hour.

coach.say: The owner is coming in an hour.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The owner is coming in an hour.

items.line_en: I have written instructions for you on a piece of paper on the disk.

coach.say: I have written instructions for you on a piece of paper on the disk.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have written instructions for you on a piece of paper on the disk.

items.line_en: Just read it and change the tyre.

coach.say: Just read it and change the tyre.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Just read it and / change the tyre.

items.line_en: Oh no, I used the instruction sheet to wrap some wasas.

coach.say: Oh no, I used the instruction sheet to wrap some wasas.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh no, / I used the instruction sheet to wrap some wasas.

items.line_en: Oh, the jack near you in everything.

coach.say: Oh, the jack near you in everything.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / the jack near you in everything.

items.line_en: Ah, that tyre is usually punctured by a sharp object,

coach.say: Ah, that tyre is usually punctured by a sharp object,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ah, / that tyre is usually punctured by a sharp object,

items.line_en: which lowers the air pressure in the tyre.

coach.say: which lowers the air pressure in the tyre.
coach.hint: Chunk it: which lowers the air pressure in the tyre.

items.line_en: Oh no, what do I do?

coach.say: Oh no, what do I do?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh no, / what do I do?

items.line_en: Wait.

coach.say: Wait.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wait.

items.line_en: Ah, ah, I know what to do.

coach.say: Ah, ah, I know what to do.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ah, / ah, / I know what to do.

items.line_en: Subandee, what is this?

coach.say: Subandee, what is this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subandee, / what is this?

items.line_en: It's, sir.

coach.say: It's, sir.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's, / sir.

items.line_en: Didn't you say that all tyres must have equal amount of air pressure?

coach.say: Didn't you say that all tyres must have equal amount of air pressure?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Didn't you say that all tyres must have equal amount of air pressure?

items.line_en: The flat tyre had less air.

coach.say: The flat tyre had less air.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The flat tyre had less air.

items.line_en: So I punctured the rest of the tyres to equalize the pressure.

coach.say: So I punctured the rest of the tyres to equalize the pressure.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So I punctured the rest of the tyres to equalize the pressure.

items.line_en: And don't you, Alisa?

coach.say: And don't you, Alisa?
coach.hint: Chunk it: And don't you, / Alisa?

items.line_en: I have done that for all the cars in the shop.

coach.say: I have done that for all the cars in the shop.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have done that for all the cars in the shop.

items.line_en: Subandee!

coach.say: Subandee!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subandee!
